description_long: This is a medium-height wooden fence section composed of evenly spaced vertical slats connected by two horizontal rails, one at the top and one at the bottom. The wood appears to be stained a rich brown, giving it a classic and natural look suitable for urban parks, gardens, or residential yards. The top edge of the fence is flat, with each vertical slat cut to the same height, creating a uniform silhouette. The ends of the horizontal rails extend slightly beyond the outermost slats, providing a subtle framing effect. There are no visible decorative elements, caps, or embellishments, emphasizing a simple and functional design. The construction suggests moderate sturdiness, likely intended as a boundary or partition rather than a security barrier.
description: A simple brown wooden fence with evenly spaced vertical slats and two horizontal rails, featuring a flat top and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the evenly spaced vertical slats and the flat top edge of the fence.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same slat arrangement and horizontal rails as the front, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the depth of the rails and slats.
